pipeline_phase: Phase 4 Stage 2: Temporal Infrastructure Features (Option C Separation of Concerns)

critical_component_count.description: Count of hardware components simultaneously reporting Rank 3 (Critical).

not_ok_component_count.description: Count of hardware components simultaneously reporting Rank 2 (NOT OK / intermediate anomaly).

degraded_component_count.description: Count of hardware components simultaneously reporting Rank 1 (Degraded).

has_active_problem.description: Convenience dashboard alert flag (1 if any component > 0 or ping unreachable).

hardware_cpu_worst_status.description: Maximum available severity rank across HPE and Dell observations (cpu), ignoring missing values (skipna=True). NaN for Ping-Only servers.

hardware_cpu_disagreement_flag.description: Binary flag (1 if both HPE and Dell report cpu and differ). Excluded from ML training to avoid learning mock-data generation noise.

hardware_memory_worst_status.description: Maximum available severity rank across HPE and Dell observations (memory), ignoring missing values (skipna=True). NaN for Ping-Only servers.

hardware_memory_disagreement_flag.description: Binary flag (1 if both HPE and Dell report memory and differ). Excluded from ML training to avoid learning mock-data generation noise.

hardware_fans_worst_status.description: Maximum available severity rank across HPE and Dell observations (fans), ignoring missing values (skipna=True). NaN for Ping-Only servers.

hardware_fans_disagreement_flag.description: Binary flag (1 if both HPE and Dell report fans and differ). Excluded from ML training to avoid learning mock-data generation noise.

hardware_storage_worst_status.description: Maximum available severity rank across HPE and Dell observations (storage), ignoring missing values (skipna=True). NaN for Ping-Only servers.

hardware_storage_disagreement_flag.description: Binary flag (1 if both HPE and Dell report storage and differ). Excluded from ML training to avoid learning mock-data generation noise.

hardware_temperature_worst_status.description: Maximum available severity rank across HPE and Dell observations (temperature), ignoring missing values (skipna=True). NaN for Ping-Only servers.

hardware_temperature_disagreement_flag.description: Binary flag (1 if both HPE and Dell report temperature and differ). Excluded from ML training to avoid learning mock-data generation noise.

hardware_power_worst_status.description: Maximum available severity rank across HPE and Dell observations (power), ignoring missing values (skipna=True). NaN for Ping-Only servers.

hardware_power_disagreement_flag.description: Binary flag (1 if both HPE and Dell report power and differ). Excluded from ML training to avoid learning mock-data generation noise.

ping_status_binary_lag1.description: Network reachability in immediate preceding slot (-4h). Preserved as truthful NaN at Slot 1 (no prior history).

ping_status_binary_lag2.description: Network reachability two slots ago (-8h). Preserved as truthful NaN at Slot 1 & 2. Identifies flapping with lag1.

ping_timeout_rate_3slot.description: Rolling mean of network timeouts over last 3 slots (12h). min_periods=1 evaluates available slots without generating NaNs.

ping_timeout_rate_6slot.description: Rolling mean of network timeouts over last 6 slots (24h). min_periods=1 evaluates available slots without generating NaNs.

problems_active_sum_6slot.description: Rolling sum of active problem slots over last 6 slots (24h). Measures sustained daily instability.
